name: savis-collection-root
description: Root configuration for SAVI'S Collection streetwear store

scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build:frontend
scripts.sync-products: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const db = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('backend/database.json', 'utf8')); fs.writeFileSync('frontend/src/products.json', JSON.stringify(db.products, null, 2), 'utf8'); console.log('Products successfully synced from backend database to frontend catalog!');"
